description: Notte Ristorante, led by Chef Michael Angeloni and the team behind The Berczy Tavern, evolves the former Amano Trattoria into a refined, repeatable escape. The menu anchors on fresh pasta and Roman-style pizza alongside seasonal secondi, steaks, and vegetable-forward dishes designed for comfortable dining. With an energetic room, central bar, and well-priced drinks program, Notte offers approachable Italian hospitality—generous, unpretentious, and effortlessly easy to return to.

description: Aloette Bay, located within CIBC Square, is the sister location to the beloved Michelin Recommended Aloette created by Chef Patrick Kriss. This location mirrors the design and style of the Spadina location while adding a touch of sophistication that reflects the dynamic energy of its new neighbourhood. Opened in 2024, Aloette Bay is conveniently situated just steps from Union Station, Scotiabank Arena, and the heart of downtown Toronto.

description: Perched on the 38th floor of The Well, Aera (pronounced “era”) delivers a sky-high dining experience that blends bold flavours with breathtaking views of Toronto’s skyline. In the heart of King West, this refined destination redefines the modern steakhouse, offering everything from expertly prepared prime cuts to premium sushi. Guests are welcomed into a beautifully designed main dining room, where elevated cuisine meets sophisticated style in one of the city’s most striking settings.

ai.one_liner: Breathtaking views, expertly prepared steaks, and premium sushi in a refined setting.
ai.dietary_summary: 3 vegetarian, 8 gluten-free options across the menus.

description: A favourite North Toronto neighbourhood restaurant, The Monkey Bar offers a contemporary bistro menu designed and prepared by proprietor and Chef Richard Fox-Revett. Everything is prepared in-house, from sourdough bread, seafood, meat, and pasta dishes, and even the hand-cranked ice cream, using local, sustainable and organic ingredients whenever possible. The extensive wine list features new and old world wines by the glass, half litre and bottle. The atmosphere is warm and inviting, and the service is knowledgeable and friendly.

description: At Scaddabush, the approach to cooking starts with a very simple rule: anything they can make from scratch, they do. It’s an Italian thing – and frankly, it’s just more delicious that way. When you join them, their mission is to deliver the most fresh, authentic Italian experience, from fresh made pastas to stone baked pizzas and artisanal cocktails. A true Italian indulgent experience at their Kitchen & Bar.

description: Located in Yorkville, Koko Share Bar is a cozy, modern Korean & Japanese restaurant. Koko is known for their signature Dolsot (Hot Stone Bowl) Bibimbap (meaning mixed rice), beautifully and traditionally presented on a hot stone sizzling bowl and enjoyed by Toronto food lovers for more than ten years. Blending authentic Korean and Japanese flavours, the menu also offers Japanese modern rolls, noodles, and grilled items prepared with the freshest ingredients.

ai.one_liner: Cozy Korean & Japanese share bar in Yorkville.
ai.dietary_summary: 14 vegan, 8 vegetarian, 12 gluten-free options across the menus.

description:
Mention Rosa Marinuzzi's name, or that of her trattoria - 7 Numbers - to anyone in Toronto's Eglinton West or Danforth neighbourhoods and chances are they'll exclaim, 'Mama Rosa?!' 
Whether at the local gelateria, the salon, the coffee shop, or the grocer, her laughter and joyful enthusiasm is more than just a reputation, it's a presence. With a focus on fresh, ripe ingredients, Rosa never fails to express their natural, vibrant flavours.
At Seven Numbers Eglinton, the appetizers, mains and desserts are more than just dishes; they're a testament to their commitment to quality, creativity, and the rich tapestry of Italian cuisine. Each bite tells a story of passion, tradition, and culinary innovation, inviting you to embark on a journey of taste and discovery with every mouthful.

standouts: Pollo alla Griglia con Salsa Verde
ai.one_liner: Midtown's neighbourhood favourite for Italian classics and cozy vibes.

description: PIANO PIANO is the Italian restaurant you always wished was just around the corner. Sophisticated and fun, PIANO PIANO serves deeply satisfying food that comes in just the right size. If there’s a common thread that runs through PIANO PIANO, it’s a deep-seated soulfulness and sensuality that’s at once warm, welcoming and just plain fun.

description:
Chef Fawzi Kotb brings a sophisticated depth of knowledge to Velouté Bistro @ Palace Pier. Velouté is a contemporary and chic bistro that promotes the terroir farm-to-table slow food movement using locally sourced ingredients and unique food preparation methods which inspire and challenge the most discerning palette. 
Veloute has won several awards including Canadian Choice Award for Fine Dining (2025) in Etobicoke, the DiRona Award 2025 and 2026 for its refined French cuisine and intimate dining experience, and the Tripadvisor's Travellers' Choice Award for its excellent reviews and service. 
Complimentary parking available.

description: Z Bar & Grille is the quirky little spot on Eglinton West you want to know about when you're in the mood for amazing Caribbean cuisine. All year round, rain or shine, authentic jerk chicken is cooked on a barrel drum, the brisket is slow smoked, the burgers are made in-house and everything is seasoned just right. Since they opened more than 20 years ago, the Z team has gone through 6 barrel drums and cooked more than 650,000 pounds of chicken, pork, and brisket, and still love what they do! You will taste the difference! Craft beers, cocktails and homemade desserts round out the menu.

ai.one_liner: Quirky Little Jamaica spot for authentic jerk and comfort food.
ai.dietary_summary: 6 vegan, 10 vegetarian, 10 gluten-free options across the menus.

description: Nestled within The Ritz-Carlton in downtown Toronto, TOCA elevates traditional Italian cuisine by incorporating the finest locally sourced, seasonal ingredients. TOCA's elegant setting provides the perfect backdrop for a culinary experience that celebrates both authenticity and innovation.

description: Opened in 2024 in The Well, Lulu Bar Toronto serves up a taste of the Pacific. Lulu’s menu pays tribute to the Pacific Ocean and the many regions that touch it, with influences from Asia to Hawaii, California to British Columbia, resulting in light and fresh fare that is heavy on flavour. The welcoming, airy space is reminiscent of that hidden gem spot from your last vacation.

description: Coppi Ristorante delivers the quality and consistency of truly authentic Italian food. An intrinsic part of the Lawrence Park community, they have welcomed businesses, family, and friends in Toronto for the more than two decades. Their bold look echoes a fresh infusion of the food, life and style of Italy that they have honoured throughout the years. As always, their aim is to create a gratifying culinary experience for great lovers of food and wine.

description: The Rabbit Hole invites guests to hop on over for elevated pub fare and exceptional cocktails. Rooted in bold British flavours and locally sourced ingredients, the menu features familiar comfort classics alongside cheeky twists on traditional pub dishes—served in a whimsically designed dining room. For those who prefer dining al fresco, the expansive three-level patio offers a lush garden oasis in the heart of Toronto’s Financial District.

ai.one_liner: Whimsical British comfort with a twist and lively patio dining.
ai.dietary_summary: 2 vegan, 11 vegetarian, 6 gluten-free options across the menus.

appetizers.description: Lightly battered and golden-fried tender calamari served alongside blistered shishito peppers for a playful contrast of textures and a hint of mild heat, accompanied by a house-made yuzu mayo for a bright, citrusy creaminess that perfectly cuts through the richness of the seafood
appetizers.name: Fried Calamari

appetizers.description: Refined and savoury with a sophisticated play on textures: hand-chopped AAA beef tenderloin, prized for its exceptional tenderness and clean flavour, topped with crisp fried sunchoke chips for an earthy crunch, and served with house-made sourdough crostini that perfectly carries the richness of the seasoned beef
appetizers.name: Beef Tartare

appetizers.description: Golden fried cauliflower florets offering a satisfying crunch with a tender interior, layered with the intense, concentrated sweetness of sun-dried tomatoes and complemented by house-made tomato mayo which adds a creamy, zesty depth, and finished with a generous grating of aged cheese
appetizers.name: Fried Cauliflower

desserts.description: A sophisticated reimagining of the Italian classic featuring delicate layers of coffee-soaked sponge and velvety, rich mascarpone cream elevated by a unique Amaro liquor foam, which provides a complex, herbal depth and a light, airy finish; a perfect harmony of bold coffee notes, creamy indulgence, and the refined bitterness of Italian Amaro
desserts.name: Tiramisu

main_dishes.description: A stunning tribute to artisanal pasta-making featuring house-made gigli pasta, an elegant, lily-shaped noodle crafted to capture the essence of premium seafood selection - the dish is loaded with succulent scallops, tender shrimp, and fresh calamari tossed in a delicate sauce that highlights the natural sweetness of the ocean
main_dishes.name: Gigli

main_dishes.description: Handmade large artisanal tubes known for their incredible texture and ability to hold a hearty sauce paired with 24-hour slow-cooked tomato sauce, which develops an intense, concentrated sweetness and depth that only time can create, and finished with a generous grating of aged cheese for a savoury, sharp accent
main_dishes.name: Paccheri

main_dishes.description: Premium 8oz AAA striploin grilled to your preference to highlight its bold, beefy flavour and tender texture, served with a generous portion of house-made fries to ensure the perfect golden crunch
main_dishes.name: AAA Striploin Steak Frites

appetizers.description: A sophisticated fusion of flavours featuring premium imported Italian burrata with a creamy heart, paired with the vibrant sweetness of fresh strawberries and tart gooseberries, set on a bed of delicate baby arugula with a unique miso sesame dressing and rich aged apple balsamic, and finished with a drizzle of fine Ligurian olive oil and the crunch of roasted walnuts for a perfect balance of creamy, zesty, and nutty notes
appetizers.name: Burrata Salad

appetizers.description: Fresh yellowtail hamachi, delicately rolled around a center of crispy fried leeks to create a perfect contrast between the buttery fish and a satisfying crunch, accented with a sharp jalapeño ring for a subtle kick of heat and accompanied by a refreshing seaweed salad and beautifully carved radish, completed with rich, house-made teriyaki sauce for a savoury umami finish
appetizers.name: Hamachi Carpaccio

appetizers.description: Savoury and succulent, featuring premium AAA Beef, thinly sliced and expertly wrapped around tender, crisp asparagus spears
appetizers.name: AAA Beef Asparagus Maki

desserts.description: A sophisticated reimagining of the Italian classic featuring delicate layers of coffee-soaked sponge and velvety, rich mascarpone cream elevated by a unique Amaro liquor foam, which provides a complex, herbal depth and a light, airy finish; a perfect harmony of bold coffee notes, creamy indulgence, and the refined bitterness of Italian Amaro
desserts.name: Tiramisu

main_dishes.description: Rich and deeply flavourful 45-day aged beef ragu, slow-cooked to develop an extraordinary depth that pairs perfectly with house-made pappardelle
main_dishes.name: 45-Day Aged Beef Ragu

main_dishes.description: Perfectly grilled fresh sea bass with tender, flaky flesh and expertly crisped skin, creating a dynamic tasting journey - the skin is divided into two signature flavour profiles: the left side is brushed with a refreshing yuzu dill glaze for a bright, citrusy finish, while the right side is coated in a tomato tabasco sauce offering a sophisticated balance of sweet and tangy, with a subtle spicy kick
main_dishes.name: Grilled Sea Bass

description: Set in an array of Victorian row houses, Sassafraz has evolved through the decades to become a magical space in the heart of Yorkville. Located at the corner of Bellair and Cumberland, the little house has 'seen it all' from the early hippie movement of the 60's to the lack of movement that comes from too much Bordeaux. Sassafraz offers an exceptional menu serving market-driven Canadian cuisine.

description: At Scaddabush, the approach to cooking starts with a very simple rule: anything they can make from scratch, they do. It’s an Italian thing – and frankly, it’s just more delicious that way. When you join them, their mission is to deliver the most fresh, authentic Italian experience, from fresh made pastas to stone baked pizzas and artisanal cocktails. A true Italian indulgent experience at their Kitchen & Bar.

description: Located in the scenic upper beaches near Kingston Rd and Scarborough Rd, The Porch Light dedicates itself to serving the best comfort food and drink in the area. From small, well-crafted lunch and dinner menus full of locally-sourced produce to a beer list featuring local craft breweries, every aspect is meticulously considered. At night, the lights are dimmed and candles are lit transforming the space into a cozy, stylish dinner spot for foodies and families alike.

description:
At Bellona, the menu is created using only the finest ingredients with a vegan and vegetarian spin on classic Italian dishes, capturing family nights at Nonna’s! 

Everything is made from scratch in-house -- the pasta, in all its shapes and colours, is made fresh from simple ingredients every morning; the pizza dough undergoes a 24-hour cold fermentation, made from scratch daily. Bellona welcomes you to pick a favourite dish! They promise they won't tell!

description: The Good Son’s menu is a reflection of Toronto's diversity, with a focus on local and seasonal organic produce, hormone free and free range proteins, and most importantly, shared food. description: Critically acclaimed to be among Canada’s best restaurants, including a recommendation from Michelin in 2022, Canoe's unique location high atop the TD Bank Tower affords a breathtaking view of the city and Lake Ontario. The design is clean and simple, yet absolutely stylish—a brilliant reflection of this country’s rich raw environment. That same brilliance is captured through the flavours and textures of its inspired regional Canadian cuisine.

description:
Rooted in the farm-to-table philosophy, Joni Restaurant offers a refined culinary experience that celebrates the best of each season, guided by the vision of Executive Chef Jonathan Williams. Honouring the richness of our region, dishes are crafted from locally sourced, sustainable ingredients, featuring the freshest produce, meats, and seafood—all prepared in-house.
Chef Williams’ thoughtfully curated menu evolves with the seasons, delivering exceptional flavour combinations that reflect a deep connection to the land. Each plate is a harmonious blend of simplicity and sophistication, created using contemporary techniques that honour the integrity of every ingredient and draw inspiration from diverse culinary traditions.
The ambience is equally inviting, with warm and attentive service that complements the elevated dining experience.

ai.one_liner: Seasonal fare and locally sourced ingredients in a warm, neighbourhood setting.

description: Indulge in the perfect mix of traditional Korean tastes and modern Korean cuisine in a bold, fun, and contemporary restaurant. The menu is complemented by handcrafted cocktails or a specialty whisky (Chef Victoria's favourite). At Comma, where every sip is as memorable as every bite, you're in for a great time!

description: Lee Restaurant, the flagship destination of Susur Lee, invites you on a vibrant culinary journey through Southeast Asia. Chef Lee combines classical French techniques with bold regional spices, creating a symphony of flavours that will delight your palate. The menu celebrates family-style dining, featuring shareable dishes served with an Asian sensibility. The ambiance at Lee is equally captivating. With a warm, mid-century modern design and sleek walnut accents, the restaurant offers an intimate and sophisticated atmosphere.

standouts: Spicy Thai Style Fried Wild Cod

description: Chon Modern Thai is the latest culinary expression from Pii Nong Thai. Nestled at the heart of midtown, Chon offers an intimate and sophisticated dining experience within a warmly refined setting. Renowned for her celebrated street-style creations, Chef Pii Nong now turns her attention to the more delicate, rarely seen side of Thai gastronomy with ancient recipes and regional traditions.

description:
Alder offers a menu centered around high-quality ingredients and thoughtful cooking, featuring prime meats, fresh seafood, and seasonal vegetables inspired by the flavours and traditions of the Mediterranean, including Spain, France, Italy, Greece, and Morocco. 

Under the leadership of Chef Patrick Kriss and his dedicated team, Alder delivers a warm and approachable dining experience that celebrates exceptional food, genuine hospitality, and a vibrant atmosphere. Alder has been recognized in the Toronto Michelin Guide for 2023, 2024, and 2025.

ai.one_liner: Upscale Mediterranean dining with a cozy twist from Chef Patrick Kriss.

description: Gatsby by Windsor Arms is where comfort meets luxury, from the decor to its seasonal menus. The Gatsby offers a fresh perspective and refined approach to comforting cuisine, set in a dramatic yet cozy atmosphere, along with premium service, an impressive wine collection, and a creatively curated art collection. The Gatsby's menu will tantalize your taste buds, stimulate engaging conversation, and leave you with a truly memorable experience.

description: A beloved destination since 1987, Auberge du Pommier blends timeless French elegance with modern culinary flair. description: Nestled in the heart of downtown Toronto's The Well, The Dorset offers a refined taste of the British coast and countryside. Executive Chef Ryan Lister, hailing from the seaside town of Weymouth, Dorset, brings his culinary roots to life with seasonal, contemporary British fare. Guests can enjoy fresh coastal flavours in a warm, inviting atmosphere, whether seated indoors or on the charming outdoor patio.

description: DaiLo's modern Asian cuisine is predominantly Chinese with French influences using modern techniques with traditional recipes to create unique dishes. At the heart of the menu is a love and respect for the dishes Chef Nick Liu ate growing up as the son of Hakka parents in Canada, but importantly, they are the dishes his ancestors have been eating for hundreds of years. Ancient favourites are augmented by Liu’s signature flair and updated to suit the western palate and the modern demand for local and sustainable ingredients.

ai.one_liner: Modern Asian twist on classic dishes in Little Italy.

description: The Ace's menu has been meticulously crafted to showcase the best that the Ontario seasons have to offer. Taking a seasonal approach to the menu not only allows the natural environment to dictate what The Ace has on offer, but also presents The Ace team with unique creative opportunities. These opportunities, born from the limitations of the seasons, result in a variety of dishes that highlight beautiful local ingredients sourced from Canadian farmers. Most of The Ace's purveyors are deeply committed to sustainability and grow their products using organic methods.

ai.one_liner: Ontario-seasonal dishes in a warm West Toronto spot.
ai.dietary_summary: 6 vegetarian, 5 gluten-free options across the menus.

description: At the corner of Yonge and Wellington, The Joneses offers a playful take on comfort food in a mid-century modern-inspired setting. The menu features premium steaks, standout seafood, fresh pastas, and crave-worthy classics, all complemented by a bold cocktail and wine program. Guests can dine indoors or unwind in the stylish solarium—an inviting covered patio. The Joneses delivers a heaping dose of nostalgia in Toronto’s bustling downtown core.

description: Soaring 31 floors high, atop The St. Regis Toronto, LOUIX LOUIS is a mystical spot. Its interior mimics a crystal whiskey glass, reflecting Toronto’s distillery heritage. The dramatic two-story Grand Bar features 500+ dark spirits—one of the largest collections in North America. Local artist Madison van Rijn’s 60-ft mural celebrates Canadian whisky, inviting guests to savour forgotten classics and rediscover the art of conversation.

ai.one_liner: St. Regis rooftop offers luxurious French-American fare and panoramic views.

description:
Since 1995, Ruth’s Chris Steak House Downtown Toronto has honoured the same recipe for success that was created by founder, Ruth Fertel and Canadian born, Toronto owner Lana Duke. 
The recipe is simple: Fresh ingredients. Classic dishes. Skilled preparation. Warm hospitality and a passion for every detail to create the perfect night. Recognized worldwide for the finest aged USDA Prime beef available, steaks are broiled to order and served sizzling to stay hot and juicy to the last delicious bite.

ai.one_liner: Classic steakhouse for a special evening.

description:
At Bellona, the menu is created using only the finest ingredients with a vegan and vegetarian spin on classic Italian dishes, capturing family nights at Nonna’s! 

Everything is made from scratch in-house -- the pasta, in all its shapes and colours, is made fresh from simple ingredients every morning; the pizza dough undergoes a 24-hour cold fermentation, made from scratch daily. Bellona welcomes you to pick a favourite dish! They promise they won't tell!

ai.one_liner: Vegan twist on Italian classics in a warm neighbourhood spot.
ai.dietary_summary: 15 vegan, 7 vegetarian, 3 gluten-free options across the menus.

description: Little Sister is a vibrant Indonesian food bar in the heart of midtown where bold island flavours meet a relaxed, modern dining experience. Inspired by the rich culinary traditions of Indonesia, the menu celebrates aromatic spices, shared plates, and soulful dishes crafted with authenticity and heart.
